mapper.insert: insert into BSC_SECURITY (VC_SCODE, VC_CODE, VC_SNAME, VC_NAME, VC_SPELL_ABBR, VC_ISIN, VC_CURRENCY, L_MARKET, VC_COMPANY_CODE, VC_KIND, L_OFFER_DATE, L_LIST_DATE, L_CANCEL_DATE, C_VALID_FLAG, D_UPDATETIME, ETL_TIME) values (#{vcScode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcSname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcSpellAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcIsin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcCurrency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lMarket,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcCompanyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcKind,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lOfferDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lListDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lCancelDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cValidFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{dUpdatetime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{etlTime,jdbcType=DATE})
mapper.select: select VC_SCODE, VC_CODE, VC_SNAME, VC_NAME, VC_SPELL_ABBR, VC_ISIN, VC_CURRENCY, L_MARKET, VC_COMPANY_CODE, VC_KIND, L_OFFER_DATE, L_LIST_DATE, L_CANCEL_DATE, C_VALID_FLAG, D_UPDATETIME, ETL_TIME from BSC_SECURITY

SELECT DISTINCT T.VC_INTER_CODE, T.VC_SCODE, T.VC_SNAME, E.VC_ITEM_NAME MARKET_NAME, A.VC_COMPANY_SNAME, B.VC_CREDIT_RANK AS BODYINNERCREDIT, D.VC_CREDIT_RANK AS INNERBONDCREDIT, C.VC_CREDIT_RANK AS OUTBONDCREDIT FROM BSC_SECURITY T LEFT JOIN BSC_INSTITUTIONPROFILE A ON T.VC_COMPANY_CODE = A.VC_COMPANY_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT T.VC_COMPANY_CODE, T.VC_CREDIT_RANK FROM BSC_INNERINSTITUTIONCREDIT T WHERE T.L_END_DATE = (SELECT MAX(L_END_DATE) FROM BSC_INSTITUTIONCREDIT WHERE VC_COMPANY_CODE = T.VC_COMPANY_CODE)) B ON T.VC_COMPANY_CODE = B.VC_COMPANY_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT T.VC_SCODE, T.VC_CREDIT_RANK FROM V_BSC_BONDCREDIT T WHERE T.L_END_DATE = (SELECT MAX(L_END_DATE) FROM BSC_BONDCREDIT WHERE VC_SCODE = T.VC_SCODE)) C ON T.VC_SCODE = C.VC_SCODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT T.VC_SCODE, T.VC_CREDIT_RANK FROM BSC_INNERBONDCREDIT T WHERE T.L_RATE_TYPE = '1' AND T.L_END_DATE = (SELECT MAX(L_END_DATE) FROM BSC_INNERBONDCREDIT WHERE VC_SCODE = T.VC_SCODE)) D ON T.VC_SCODE = D.VC_SCODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT VC_ITEM_VALUE,VC_ITEM_NAME FROM T_BASE_DICTIONARY WHERE l_dictionary_no = 100005) E ON TO_CHAR(T.L_MARKET) = E.VC_ITEM_VALUE WHERE T.VC_INTER_CODE = #{scode}

SELECT A.VC_SNAME, X.VC_ITEM_NAME MARKET_NAME, C.VC_COMPANY_SNAME, D.VC_KEY_NAME, B.TOTAL_SHARE, B.TRADE_SHARE, FNC_STOCK_PURCHASE(VC_CODE) AS STOCK_LIST FROM BSC_SECURITY A LEFT JOIN T_BASE_DICTIONARY X ON A.L_MARKET = X.VC_ITEM_VALUE AND X.L_DICTIONARY_NO = '100005' LEFT JOIN BSC_INSTITUTIONPROFILE C ON A.VC_COMPANY_CODE = C.VC_COMPANY_CODE LEFT JOIN V_STOCK_EQUITY B ON A.VC_COMPANY_CODE = B.VC_COMPANY_CODE LEFT JOIN BSC_STOCKBOARD D ON A.VC_SCODE = D.VC_SCODE AND A.VC_COMPANY_CODE = D.VC_COMPANY_CODE WHERE (A.C_ASSET_O32 = '2' OR A.VC_KIND = 1) AND A.VC_INTER_CODE = #{scode}

select VC_INTER_CODE,VC_SCODE, VC_CODE, VC_SNAME, VC_NAME, VC_SPELL_ABBR, VC_ISIN, VC_CURRENCY, L_MARKET, VC_COMPANY_CODE, VC_KIND, L_OFFER_DATE, L_LIST_DATE, L_CANCEL_DATE, C_VALID_FLAG, D_UPDATETIME, ETL_TIME from BSC_SECURITY
and (VC_CODE = #{secCode} or VC_CODE LIKE CONCAT(#{secCode}, '%'))
and (VC_NAME = #{secCode} or VC_NAME LIKE CONCAT(#{secCode}, '%'))
and (VC_SPELL_ABBR = #{secCode} or VC_SPELL_ABBR LIKE CONCAT(#{secCode}, '%'))
ORDER BY VC_CODE

SELECT VC_INTER_CODE, VC_SCODE, VC_CODE, VC_SNAME, VC_NAME, VC_SPELL_ABBR, VC_ITEM_NAME AS MARKET_NAME, VC_COMPANY_CODE, VC_KIND, C_ASSET_O32 FROM BSC_SECURITY LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM T_BASE_DICTIONARY WHERE L_DICTIONARY_NO = 100005) ON TO_CHAR(L_MARKET) = VC_ITEM_VALUE WHERE INSTR(VC_CODE||VC_NAME||VC_SPELL_ABBR,#{secCode})>0 ORDER BY DECODE(INSTR(VC_CODE,#{secCode}),'0','9999',INSTR(VC_CODE,#{secCode})) ASC, DECODE(INSTR(VC_SPELL_ABBR,#{secCode}),'0','9999',INSTR(VC_SPELL_ABBR,#{secCode})) ASC, DECODE(INSTR(VC_NAME,#{secCode}),'0','9999',INSTR(VC_NAME,#{secCode})) ASC
SELECT a.VC_CODE, a.VC_NAME FROM BSC_SECURITY a WHERE a.VC_CODE = #{vcCode} and a.L_MARKET = #{lMarket}

SELECT a.VC_CODE, a.VC_NAME, a.VC_SNAME, a.L_MARKET, a.VC_KIND, a.VC_SCODE, a.VC_INTER_CODE FROM BSC_SECURITY a WHERE a.VC_CODE in
#{id}
